titles.text: Shin Kidou Senki Gundam Wing: Endless Duel
新機動戦記ガンダム W Endless Duel

descriptions.text: It is the year After Colony 195, and war between the Space Colonies and Earth has begun. To give the colonies an edge, they send 5 young soldiers, trained to perfection, to earth in the most powerful of Mobile Suits-Gundams. With their arrival, the tide of the war changes as they battle against the Earth forces and the Colonies of their origin.
